title: Kessim and Redcurrant Crumble
description: A sweet and tangy dessert featuring kessim and redcurrant topped with a crunchy crumble mixture.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the kessim and redcurrant.
In another bowl, combine the flour, cold unsalted butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar.
Add the egg wash to the dry ingredients and mix until a crumbly mixture forms.
Transfer the kessim and redcurrant mixture to a baking dish.
Top the mixture with the crumble topping.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
Serve warm with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream.
